title: Vivi Pushes Toward Yuba
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on vivi pushes toward yuba, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Pushes Toward Yuba. Vivi and the Straw Hats decide that stopping the war means confronting Crocodile directly instead of chasing the rebels blindly. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If that's the case, then go home, because we're of different opinions.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All of us here are scared... None of us want to fight.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHAT!? Then why the heck are you fighting! That doesn't make any sense!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Because the war's already begun...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The country wished this upon itself...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: None of us "want" to fight, but we have no choice but to fight...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whether or not you can understand that is irrelevant... Now go home!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I said go home!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is no place for a kid!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's wrong, Kouza?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It ain't like you,

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: To go venting your frustrations at a little kid...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I just couldn't handle how much he reminded me of my own self when I was a kid...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Guess I haven't changed at all...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...Did you get the weapons?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Not as much as we'd like to have...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: The Royal Army prevented us from taking their armour...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Send a message out to all of our forces...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As soon as we finish equipping ourselves with weapons,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We will amount a full-scale attack on the Capital!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Absolutely not! How many times have I told you no already!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Royal Palace at Alubarma

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: You want to get back at them for attacking us?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: This isn't a fight between children we're dealing with here!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: But your majesty! If we do not act soon, our kingdom may very well fall!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So what if it does!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You would use that as an excuse to kill our people!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Doing precisely that would be the downfall of the entire kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Listen well! The country is its people!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Ever since that "Dance Powder Incident,"

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: There's been a group of people instigating trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's THAT group of people we should be fighting!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But the fact remains that we don't even have the faintest idea who this "shadow" is!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And it'll be too late to act once this shadow envelops our entire kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: So please, your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Absolutely not...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Get that through your head...

summary: This part develops vivi pushes toward yuba and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
